base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of portraits_ww — a ui from 1991 street fighter ii. World Warrior char-select portraits — 8 warriors + 4 bosses. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: World Warrior char-select portraits — 8 warriors + 4 bosses
